name: agent-offline-alert
description: Records a monitoring.alert_state row (via alert.dedupe) and emails the org's alert recipient when a Synapse agent goes offline. Triggered by Kafka topic monitor.alert.agent_offline emitted by the platform-DB trigger notify_agent_offline. The approval.gate suspend lasts up to 4 hours; the renotify-sweeper handles reminders while the run is suspended. Duplicate events within the dedupe renotify window (30 min) are suppressed so a second notify chain never starts.

channels.body_mrkdwn:
Synapse on *${inputs.event.hostname}* (`${inputs.event.agent_id}`) in workspace `${inputs.workspace_id}` stopped reporting at *${inputs.event.last_seen}*.

If this is unexpected, check the host's network connectivity and the Synapse service status. `systemctl status synapse` is the fastest first probe.

parameters.message: agent-offline UNACKNOWLEDGED after 4h of waiting for ${inputs.event.hostname} (${inputs.event.agent_id})
agent-offline alert suppressed by dedupe (already published within renotify window) for ${inputs.event.hostname} (${inputs.event.agent_id})
